title: SingleLogicalConditionResult
description: SingleLogicalConditionResult: Object representing result of ISingleLogicalCondition.

Passed.description: Information whether the object passed or failed the condition. Null means inconclusive result.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.
Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
